controller_design_notes: Same architecture as the prior MVP regulator run; serves as the warmup-only baseline for the corrected (4-model) Δv comparison. K_t shape (139, 2, 4); 1112 params/replicate. Step counter lives in state.hidden. K initialised to zeros.

resumption_strategy.mechanism: Warmup-only run. Strict mid-warmup resumption (continue from a saved optimizer state at batch N) is NOT supported by the training script. Extending the warmup by re-running with a larger --n-warmup-batches IS supported but overwrites warmup_model.eqx with a fresh longer training trajectory; the previous shorter trajectory cannot be continued exactly from its end state. Acceptable for this MVP because the baseline-vs-adversarial Δv comparison only requires shared warmup between the pair; extending beyond 1000 batches would be a new variant under a different tag.
resumption_strategy.recommended_extension_path: For warmup > 1000 batches, create new variant directories (e.g. linear_regulator__baseline_2k) rather than overwriting these.

notes: Baseline (warmup-only) regulator run. Pairs with linear_regulator__adversarial (same seed=42, same warmup schedule). Δv_regulator = (peak_v(adversarial) - 0.158) / 0.158 — see results/410d7ac/notes/delta_v_summary.json for the computed value.
